nodes.label: Tests for platform feature endpoints: FEAT-01 through FEAT-05.  Covers:   FEAT-0
POST /api/content/repurpose calls bulk_repurpose and returns success.
GET /api/content/repurpose/preview/{job_id} returns preview without creating job
POST /api/campaigns creates campaign with campaign_id starting with 'camp_' and
GET /api/campaigns returns list of user's campaigns.
Tests for /api/templates list, filter, single, and use-template endpoints.
GET /api/templates returns list of templates with category and hook_type fields.
POST /api/templates/{id}/use returns content suitable for generation form pre-fi
GET /api/content/export/bulk?format=csv returns CSV StreamingResponse with heade
GET /api/content/export/bulk for user with no jobs returns CSV with only header
POST /api/onboarding/import-history calls process_bulk_import with valid posts.
POST /api/onboarding/import-history with empty posts returns 422 (Pydantic min_l
Verify process_bulk_import is called with the authenticated user's user_id.
